site.title: Matheus Machado
site.subtitle: Technology Enthusiast
site.description: Personal portfolio and blog of Matheus Machado — building products at the intersection of software engineering, design, and Bayesian inference.

hero.title: About me
hero.bio: I'm from Aracaju, Brazil, and I build products and tools from scratch — from the first commit to the first paying user. I'd rather solve problems cheaply and efficiently than add complexity where it isn't needed. Right now I work with Next.js and Node, applying that to AI-powered products.
